purpose: Classify references to SUPPORT/QUESTIONABLE_OR_QUARANTINE and block active use without an explicit exception.

rows.trigger: A non-policy active repository file references SUPPORT/QUESTIONABLE_OR_QUARANTINE without an allowed_active_use_exception.
rows.required_action: Remove the active dependency or create a salvage/admission exception in the quarantine index.

rows.trigger: A governance, policy, report, taskpack, migration queue, quarantine index, or Schola learning file mentions the quarantine path as a rule subject.
rows.required_action: Allow as evidence/reference only; do not treat as active source use.

rows.trigger: A file path matches an explicit allowed_active_use_exception in the quarantine index.
rows.required_action: Keep the exception narrow and tied to a salvage/admission receipt.
